---
name: Spec change
about: Propose a change to a protocol specification or whitepaper document
title: "spec: <short description>"
labels: spec-change
---

## Which spec
<!-- File path, e.g. specs/04-SMART-CONTRACTS-SPEC.md, plus the section being changed. -->

## Proposed change
<!-- Describe the change concretely. Quote the existing text and the proposed replacement where useful. -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why this change? What problem does it solve? Cite implementation experience, security findings, ecosystem feedback, etc. -->

## Breaking change?
<!-- yes / no — and if yes, what migration is required for existing implementers. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other designs you ruled out and why. -->
